adherence_assessment.reasoning: The provided Python orchestration script adheres to the 'Thin Orchestrator' pattern as defined by Codomyrmex. It accepts configuration transparently by setting the scripts directory and run ID without hardcoding them directly in the script. The script formulates dependencies cleanly by using the codomyrmex.orchestrator.core module to execute the main method. It executes the core method by running the discovered scripts and logging the output beautifully. Finally, it exits cleanly with an exit code of 0.
